stub: She is a Conservative MP who comes from a white middle class background.
personalization: She tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of her party, even when that conflicts with the wishes of her constituents.
substantive: She supports adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration.
justification: In political debates, she regularly explains how her decisions help to promote the interests of people like you (e.g. of your class and educational background).
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “I always listen to voters’ views, because at the end of the day they get to choose whether to reelect me or not.”
text: She is a Conservative MP who comes from a white middle class background. She is from your constituency. She tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of her party, even when that conflicts with the wishes of her constituents. She supports adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration. In political debates, she regularly explains how her decisions help to promote the interests of people like you (e.g. of your class and educational background). Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “I always listen to voters’ views, because at the end of the day they get to choose whether to reelect me or not.”
